name: How long after using AI can it still hurt my Chicago personal injury case?
description: Forever during litigation—discovery has no time limit.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long after using AI can it still hurt my Chicago personal injury case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Forever during litigation—discovery has no time limit.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Indefinitely, as discovery can request records anytime case is active.[1] No time limit on discoverability.[1] Key factors: Ongoing risk if inconsistent; applies nationwide.[1] Inform your lawyer immediately. Preserve for honesty.
